scripts.check:seo: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8');const required=['<link rel=\"canonical\"','property=\"og:url\"','name=\"twitter:card\"','application/ld+json'];const missing=required.filter((token)=>!html.includes(token));if(missing.length){console.error('Faltan marcadores SEO:', missing.join(', '));process.exit(1)}console.log('Marcadores SEO OK');"
